dsl_rule.translation_notes: Gapping-Up Doji pattern requires: (1) upward gap from prior day detected via close > prev_high, (2) doji formation detected via minimal body (body < 0.01 or ~0% of range), (3) today's lower shadow above yesterday's upper shadow verified via low > prev_high. Exit on reversal when close falls below open. Direction marked CONTEXT_DEPENDENT per original signal to allow both continuation and reversal interpretations. Shadow length variations and doji types are captured by the body constraint. Success rates and volume trends marked AUTHOR_SILENT are not translatable to specific rule conditions.

Shadow length variations and doji types are captured by the body constraint. Success rates and volume trends marked AUTHOR_SILENT are not translatable to specific rule conditions.

source_rule_text: Gapping-Up Doji: Price gaps upward and forms a doji candlestick where opening and closing prices are at or near the same value, with today's lower shadow above yesterday's upper shadow, creating a visible price gap on the chart.
